name: MoE Transformer Block
description: Mixtral-style transformer block: RMSNorm -> RoPE Attention -> Residual -> RMSNorm -> MoE FFN -> Residual
code:
# === MoE Transformer Block {{_id}} ===
_mt{{_id}}_d = {{dim}}
_mt{{_id}}_h = {{n_heads}}
_mt{{_id}}_dk = _mt{{_id}}_d // _mt{{_id}}_h
_mt{{_id}}_hd = {{hidden_dim}}
_mt{{_id}}_ne = {{n_experts}}
_mt{{_id}}_k = {{top_k}}
#
# -- Attention Norm --
_mt{{_id}}_an = np.ones(_mt{{_id}}_d, dtype=np.float32)
_mt{{_id}}_xn = {{input}} * (1.0 / np.sqrt(np.mean({{input}} ** 2, axis=-1, keepdims=True) + {{eps}})) * _mt{{_id}}_an
#
# -- RoPE Attention --
_mt{{_id}}_wq = np.random.randn(_mt{{_id}}_d, _mt{{_id}}_d).astype(np.float32) * {{init_std}}
_mt{{_id}}_wk = np.random.randn(_mt{{_id}}_d, _mt{{_id}}_d).astype(np.float32) * {{init_std}}
_mt{{_id}}_wv = np.random.randn(_mt{{_id}}_d, _mt{{_id}}_d).astype(np.float32) * {{init_std}}
_mt{{_id}}_wo = np.random.randn(_mt{{_id}}_d, _mt{{_id}}_d).astype(np.float32) * {{init_std}}
_mt{{_id}}_bs, _mt{{_id}}_sl, _ = _mt{{_id}}_xn.shape
_mt{{_id}}_q = np.matmul(_mt{{_id}}_xn, _mt{{_id}}_wq.T).reshape(_mt{{_id}}_bs, _mt{{_id}}_sl, _mt{{_id}}_h, _mt{{_id}}_dk).transpose(0, 2, 1, 3)
_mt{{_id}}_kk = np.matmul(_mt{{_id}}_xn, _mt{{_id}}_wk.T).reshape(_mt{{_id}}_bs, _mt{{_id}}_sl, _mt{{_id}}_h, _mt{{_id}}_dk).transpose(0, 2, 1, 3)
_mt{{_id}}_v = np.matmul(_mt{{_id}}_xn, _mt{{_id}}_wv.T).reshape(_mt{{_id}}_bs, _mt{{_id}}_sl, _mt{{_id}}_h, _mt{{_id}}_dk).transpose(0, 2, 1, 3)
_mt{{_id}}_freqs = 1.0 / ({{theta}} ** (np.arange(0, _mt{{_id}}_dk, 2, dtype=np.float32) / _mt{{_id}}_dk))
_mt{{_id}}_pos = np.arange(_mt{{_id}}_sl, dtype=np.float32)
_mt{{_id}}_ang = np.outer(_mt{{_id}}_pos, _mt{{_id}}_freqs)
_mt{{_id}}_cos = np.cos(_mt{{_id}}_ang).astype(np.float32)
_mt{{_id}}_sin = np.sin(_mt{{_id}}_ang).astype(np.float32)
_mt{{_id}}_qr = np.zeros_like(_mt{{_id}}_q)
_mt{{_id}}_qr[..., 0::2] = _mt{{_id}}_q[..., 0::2] * _mt{{_id}}_cos - _mt{{_id}}_q[..., 1::2] * _mt{{_id}}_sin
_mt{{_id}}_qr[..., 1::2] = _mt{{_id}}_q[..., 0::2] * _mt{{_id}}_sin + _mt{{_id}}_q[..., 1::2] * _mt{{_id}}_cos
_mt{{_id}}_kkr = np.zeros_like(_mt{{_id}}_kk)
_mt{{_id}}_kkr[..., 0::2] = _mt{{_id}}_kk[..., 0::2] * _mt{{_id}}_cos - _mt{{_id}}_kk[..., 1::2] * _mt{{_id}}_sin
_mt{{_id}}_kkr[..., 1::2] = _mt{{_id}}_kk[..., 0::2] * _mt{{_id}}_sin + _mt{{_id}}_kk[..., 1::2] * _mt{{_id}}_cos
_mt{{_id}}_sc = np.matmul(_mt{{_id}}_qr, _mt{{_id}}_kkr.transpose(0, 1, 3, 2)) / np.sqrt(_mt{{_id}}_dk)
if {{mask}} is not None:
    _mt{{_id}}_sc = np.where({{mask}} == 0, -1e9, _mt{{_id}}_sc)
_mt{{_id}}_ex = np.exp(_mt{{_id}}_sc - np.max(_mt{{_id}}_sc, axis=-1, keepdims=True))
_mt{{_id}}_aw = _mt{{_id}}_ex / np.sum(_mt{{_id}}_ex, axis=-1, keepdims=True)
_mt{{_id}}_av = np.matmul(_mt{{_id}}_aw, _mt{{_id}}_v)
_mt{{_id}}_attn = np.matmul(_mt{{_id}}_av.transpose(0, 2, 1, 3).reshape(_mt{{_id}}_bs, _mt{{_id}}_sl, _mt{{_id}}_d), _mt{{_id}}_wo.T)
_mt{{_id}}_r1 = {{input}} + _mt{{_id}}_attn
#
# -- FFN Norm --
_mt{{_id}}_fn = np.ones(_mt{{_id}}_d, dtype=np.float32)
_mt{{_id}}_r1n = _mt{{_id}}_r1 * (1.0 / np.sqrt(np.mean(_mt{{_id}}_r1 ** 2, axis=-1, keepdims=True) + {{eps}})) * _mt{{_id}}_fn
#
# -- MoE FFN --
_mt{{_id}}_wg = np.random.randn(_mt{{_id}}_ne, _mt{{_id}}_d).astype(np.float32) * {{init_std}}
_mt{{_id}}_ew_g = np.random.randn(_mt{{_id}}_ne, _mt{{_id}}_hd, _mt{{_id}}_d).astype(np.float32) * {{init_std}}
_mt{{_id}}_ew_u = np.random.randn(_mt{{_id}}_ne, _mt{{_id}}_hd, _mt{{_id}}_d).astype(np.float32) * {{init_std}}
_mt{{_id}}_ew_d = np.random.randn(_mt{{_id}}_ne, _mt{{_id}}_d, _mt{{_id}}_hd).astype(np.float32) * {{init_std}}
_mt{{_id}}_flat = _mt{{_id}}_r1n.reshape(-1, _mt{{_id}}_d)
_mt{{_id}}_nt = _mt{{_id}}_flat.shape[0]
_mt{{_id}}_logits = np.matmul(_mt{{_id}}_flat, _mt{{_id}}_wg.T)
_mt{{_id}}_tidx = np.argsort(_mt{{_id}}_logits, axis=-1)[:, -_mt{{_id}}_k:]
_mt{{_id}}_tlog = np.take_along_axis(_mt{{_id}}_logits, _mt{{_id}}_tidx, axis=-1)
_mt{{_id}}_texp = np.exp(_mt{{_id}}_tlog - np.max(_mt{{_id}}_tlog, axis=-1, keepdims=True))
_mt{{_id}}_tw = _mt{{_id}}_texp / np.sum(_mt{{_id}}_texp, axis=-1, keepdims=True)
_mt{{_id}}_moe_out = np.zeros((_mt{{_id}}_nt, _mt{{_id}}_d), dtype=np.float32)
for _mt{{_id}}_i in range(_mt{{_id}}_nt):
    for _mt{{_id}}_j in range(_mt{{_id}}_k):
        _mt{{_id}}_eidx = _mt{{_id}}_tidx[_mt{{_id}}_i, _mt{{_id}}_j]
        _mt{{_id}}_ew = _mt{{_id}}_tw[_mt{{_id}}_i, _mt{{_id}}_j]
        _mt{{_id}}_gv = np.matmul(_mt{{_id}}_flat[_mt{{_id}}_i], _mt{{_id}}_ew_g[_mt{{_id}}_eidx].T)
        _mt{{_id}}_uv = np.matmul(_mt{{_id}}_flat[_mt{{_id}}_i], _mt{{_id}}_ew_u[_mt{{_id}}_eidx].T)
        _mt{{_id}}_act = _mt{{_id}}_gv * (1.0 / (1.0 + np.exp(-_mt{{_id}}_gv)))
        _mt{{_id}}_moe_out[_mt{{_id}}_i] += _mt{{_id}}_ew * np.matmul(_mt{{_id}}_act * _mt{{_id}}_uv, _mt{{_id}}_ew_d[_mt{{_id}}_eidx].T)
_mt{{_id}}_ffn = _mt{{_id}}_moe_out.reshape(_mt{{_id}}_bs, _mt{{_id}}_sl, _mt{{_id}}_d)
#
# -- Residual 2 --
{{output}} = _mt{{_id}}_r1 + _mt{{_id}}_ffn
